formulas.name: Dissolution Method
formulas.formula: Method of dissolution: Partner's Capital A/c + Partner's Current A/c
formulas.variables: Partner's Capital A/c, Partner's Current A/c
formulas.notes: Used to determine the amount received by a partner upon dissolution

formulas.name: Amount of Share of Dissolved Partner
formulas.formula: Amount = (Partner's Capital A/c + Partner's Current A/c)
formulas.variables: Partner's Capital A/c, Partner's Current A/c
formulas.notes: Used to determine the amount received by a partner upon dissolution

formulas.name: Revaluation A/c
formulas.notes: Used to record the increase or decrease in value of assets and liabilities on dissolution

formulas.name: Goodwill on Dissolution
formulas.formula: Goodwill = (Profit of the firm × Number of years) / (Average Profit × Number of years)
formulas.variables: Profit of the firm, Average Profit, Number of years
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the amount of goodwill on dissolution

formulas.name: Adjustment for Goodwill
formulas.formula: Goodwill A/c (Dr.) or Partner's Capital A/c (Cr.)
formulas.notes: Used to adjust the amount of goodwill on dissolution

formulas.name: Interest on Capital
formulas.formula: Interest on capital = (Partner's capital × Rate of interest × Time)
formulas.variables: Partner's capital, Rate of interest, Time
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the interest on capital for the period of dissolution

formulas.name: Interest on Drawings
formulas.formula: Interest on drawings = (Drawings × Rate of interest × Time)
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the interest on drawings for the period of dissolution

formulas.name: Interest on Loan
formulas.formula: Interest on loan = (Loan × Rate of interest × Time)
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the interest on loan for the period of dissolution

formulas.name: Adjustment for Interest
formulas.formula: Interest A/c (Dr.) or Partner's Capital A/c (Cr.)
formulas.notes: Used to adjust the amount of interest on capital, drawings, and loan
